title: Hello RedwoodSDK
author: Pochi the Developer
body: Welcome to RedwoodSDK! This is a bare-bones starter template designed to get you up and running as quickly as possible. RedwoodSDK is a powerful tool for building server-rendered React applications with cloudflare workers.

title: Cloudflare Edge Tips & Tricks
author: Edge Master
body: When building on Cloudflare Workers, you want to keep your bundle size small and utilize edge caching effectively. Here are some top tips for optimizing your edge application performance.

title: React Server Components 101
author: React Enthusiast
body: React Server Components (RSC) represent a paradigm shift in how we build React applications. By running components on the server, we can reduce client bundle size and improve load times.
